title: Rolife Acrylic Display Box Transparent Showcase Dust Cover Designed for Dollhouse/DIY Miniature House Kit/3D Puzzle/Action Figures (11.3x9.3x9.6inch/28.7x23.7x24.4cm)
features: 【Rolife Acrylic Display Box】Designed for Rolife Dollhouse. This display case is suitable for all Rolife dolls' houses. It also fits most of Rolife's 3D Wooden Puzzles. It can also be used to display action figures.
【3 Min Easy Assembly】Easy to assemble. The edges are smooth and the acrylic case fiting perfectly against the base. The plastic is sturdy and durable, easily cleaned. It's well balanced and solid.
【Quality Materials】The main materials of the product are Polycarbonate and Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene. Rolife uses quality materials to enhance the quality of home life.

【Advantages】It is not only a display case but also a dust cover. It makes your treasured item go from plain on the shelf to being highlighted beautifully. Keep the collection clean, reduce sunlight and ultraviolet radiation, and delay plastic aging.

【Tips】Please make sure the size of what you need to display and the size of this product match. This dust cover measures 11.3x9.3x9.6inch (28.7x23.7x24.4cm). If there is any damage to the product, we offer a replacement service.

specifications_table.title: Ecoseao Acrylic Display Case with Mirror, Clear Acrylic Organizer Box Assemble Countertop Dustproof Protection Showcase for Action Figures, Collectibles, Home Storage (25cmx15cmx15cm)
features: ❤【Professional Display Case】- Outside Dimension:9.8'L x 6''W x 6'' H (25cm x 15cm x 15cm).Internal Dimensions:13.5cm x23.5cm x14.5cm. The acrylic box is high transparency and one side designed with a mirror, which can show your favorite collectibles more clearer.The innovative construction provides a 360° clear view to you, no visual restriction from any side.

❤【Solid & Dustproof】- Made with sturdy and durable acrylic,which was cut by precise laser machine, all sizes are perfect match with each other, the assembly gap is minimized, it will protect your product from dust & corrosion.

❤【Easy to Assemble】-Come with a pair of disposable gloves and a clean cloth to prevent dust and fingerprints during assembling. Please remove the protective film before assembly.Just need according the installation instruction combined the sides to the bottom and top. No tools and glues needed .

❤【Multi-purposes】- These display boxes are for anything you want to display, perfect complement for business displays or household items, such as figurines, collectibles, toys, artifacts, sports memorabilia, jewellery, antiques, dolls, action figures, souveniers, models, statues, heirlooms, and sculptures. Can be used in home, museums, retail stores or trade shows.
